name: pass_long_with_sections
text: Company: Acme Platform. Role: Backend Engineer. Responsibilities: build Spring APIs, operate batch workers, improve MySQL queries, review releases, and coordinate frontend contracts. Qualifications: Java, Spring Boot, MyBatis, SQL, testing, production debugging, and monitoring. Skills: Java Spring MySQL Docker Python TypeScript. Employment: full-time Seoul hybrid role with benefits. Apply: submit resume before the deadline. Deadline: 2026-07-31. This role owns commercial service reliability, incident response, regression testing, customer-impact analysis, API hardening, dashboard monitoring, and release readiness checks for repeated product operations.
